mapper.sql: rr.id, rr.employee_id, rr.room_id, rr.checkin_date, rr.planned_checkout_date, rr.checkout_date, rr.is_active, rr.notes, rr.total_fee, rr.status, rr.version, rr.create_by, rr.create_time, rr.update_by, rr.update_time, r.room_number AS roomNumber, r.dormitory_id AS dormitoryId, r.daily_rate AS dailyRate, d.dorm_name AS dormName, e.emp_name AS empName, e.emp_no AS empNo
FROM tbl_resident_record rr LEFT JOIN tbl_room r ON rr.room_id = r.id LEFT JOIN tbl_dormitory d ON r.dormitory_id = d.id LEFT JOIN tbl_employee e ON rr.employee_id = e.id
mapper.select:
SELECT
WHERE rr.employee_id = #{employeeId} AND rr.is_active = 1 ORDER BY rr.checkin_date DESC

SELECT
WHERE rr.room_id = #{roomId} AND rr.is_active = 1 AND #{checkinDate} <= COALESCE(rr.checkout_date, rr.planned_checkout_date, '9999-12-31') AND COALESCE(#{checkoutDate}, '9999-12-31') >= rr.checkin_date
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_resident_record ( employee_id, room_id, checkin_date, planned_checkout_date, checkout_date, is_active, notes, total_fee, status, version, create_by, create_time ) VALUES ( #{employeeId}, #{roomId}, #{checkinDate}, #{plannedCheckoutDate}, #{checkoutDate}, COALESCE(#{isActive}, 1), #{notes}, #{totalFee}, COALESCE(#{status}, 'CHECKED_IN'), 0, #{createBy}, NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE tbl_resident_record
employee_id = #{employeeId},
room_id = #{roomId},
checkin_date = #{checkinDate},
planned_checkout_date = #{plannedCheckoutDate},
checkout_date = #{checkoutDate},
is_active = #{isActive},
notes = #{notes},
total_fee = #{totalFee},
status = #{status},
version = version + 1,
update_by = #{updateBy},
update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version}
mapper.select: SELECT rr.id, rr.employee_id, rr.room_id, rr.checkin_date, rr.planned_checkout_date, rr.checkout_date, rr.is_active, rr.notes, rr.total_fee, rr.status, rr.version, rr.create_by, rr.create_time, rr.update_by, rr.update_time, r.room_number AS roomNumber, r.dormitory_id AS dormitoryId, d.dorm_name AS dormName, r.daily_rate, e.emp_name AS empName, e.emp_no AS empNo FROM tbl_resident_record rr LEFT JOIN tbl_room r ON rr.room_id = r.id LEFT JOIN tbl_dormitory d ON r.dormitory_id = d.id LEFT JOIN tbl_employee e ON rr.employee_id = e.id ORDER BY rr.checkin_date DESC, rr.id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_resident_record WHERE is_active = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_employee e WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tbl_resident_record r WHERE r.employee_id = e.id )
